boolean.name: isVentilationSkipped
boolean.title: Skip ventilation
boolean.help: In standard, the invoicing workflow has a validation step and a ventilation step. At the ventilation step, accounting entries are generated and the invoice can no longer be modified. This configuration removes the ventilation step from the workflow, and in this case it is at validation that accounting entries are generated and the invoice becomes non-editable.

boolean.name: isEnabledProductDescriptionCopyForCustomers
boolean.title: Enable product description copy for customers
boolean.help: Allows displaying on customer invoice lines the product description (description field from the product form).

boolean.name: isEnabledProductDescriptionCopyForSuppliers
boolean.title: Enable product description copy for suppliers
boolean.help: Allows displaying on supplier invoice lines the product description (description field from the product form).

boolean.name: autoGenerateInvoicePrintingFileOnSaleInvoice
boolean.title: Auto generate invoice printing file on sale invoice
boolean.help: If this option is enabled, when the customer invoice moves to ventilated status (or validated if the Skip ventilation configuration is enabled), a PDF copy of the invoice is automatically saved in the DMS.

boolean.name: autoGenerateInvoicePrintingFileOnPurchaseInvoice
boolean.title: Auto generate invoice printing file on purchase invoice
boolean.help: If this option is enabled, when the supplier invoice moves to ventilated status (or validated if the Skip ventilation configuration is enabled), a PDF copy of the invoice is automatically saved in the DMS.
